product.name: READY-MIX CONCRETE
product.description: VIC - Melbourne Metro - ECOPact- VE322EAMF. S32@56D 20mm 120SL ECOPactMAX FIB CONC. Ready-mix concrete prepared by mixing cement, coarse and fine aggregates, and water, with or without the addition of auxiliary agents and additives.
product.category: Articles of concrete, cement and plaster
product.manufacturingLocation: Laverton, Truganina, Footscray, Epping, Keilor, Preston, Oaklands Junction, Melbourne Airport, Bayswater, Springvale, Lyndhurst, Seaford, Pakenham, Hastings, Rosebud
